monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Strikes US Bases in Jordan, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Iraq
US Strikes Iran for Seventh Night, Tankers Explode in Strait of Hormuz
Iranian Ballistic Missiles and Drones Kill 2 US Troops at Air Base in Jordan

— S4 · Conflict · Muwaffaq Salti Air Base, Jordan · 1d ago. Iranian missiles hit Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, where the US had just deployed 12 F-16CJ Wild Weasel jets. Casualties and damage are unconfirmed.
